audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:Zullen we + infinitive?]] and [[grammar:misschien + V2 clause]]. Use [[grammar:Zullen we]] ...? to suggest doing something together. Use [[grammar:misschien]] for maybe or perhaps.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:Zullen we + infinitive?]]: The modal [[grammar:zullen]] forms an inclusive proposal question; the lexical infinitive remains final.; [[grammar:misschien + V2 clause]]: Fronted [[grammar:misschien]] occupies the initial field and is followed by the finite verb in V2 order.

audienceSections.normal:
#### Zullen we + infinitive?

Use [[grammar:Zullen we]] ...? to suggest doing something together. Example: [[grammar:Zullen we eerst een korte uitnodiging sturen?]]

#### misschien + V2 clause

Use [[grammar:misschien]] for maybe or perhaps. Example: [[grammar:Misschien kunnen we de grote zaal gebruiken.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### Zullen we + infinitive?

The modal [[grammar:zullen]] forms an inclusive proposal question; the lexical infinitive remains final. Literal example: [[grammar:Zullen we eerst een korte uitnodiging sturen?]]

#### misschien + V2 clause

Fronted [[grammar:misschien]] occupies the initial field and is followed by the finite verb in V2 order. Literal example: [[grammar:Misschien kunnen we de grote zaal gebruiken.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Zullen we]] ...? makes an inclusive proposal. [[grammar:Misschien]] reduces certainty and may appear first with V2 order.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Zullen we]] ...? makes an inclusive proposal. [[grammar:Misschien]] reduces certainty and may appear first with V2 order.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Zullen we volgende maand een informatieavond organiseren?]] — Shall we organize an information evening next month?
- [[grammar:Ja. Misschien kunnen we de grote zaal gebruiken.]] — Yes. Perhaps we can use the large hall.
- [[grammar:Hoeveel vrijwilligers nodigen we uit?]] — How many volunteers shall we invite?
- [[grammar:Op de lijst staan driehonderdveertig namen.]] — There are three hundred forty names on the list.
- [[grammar:Zullen we eerst een korte uitnodiging sturen?]] — Shall we first send a short invitation?
- [[grammar:Goed. Misschien meldt de helft zich aan.]] — Good. Perhaps half of them will register.
- [[grammar:Ik regel de inschrijving bij de ingang.]] — I will manage registration at the entrance.
- [[grammar:Dan organiseer ik de taakverdeling.]] — Then I will organize the division of tasks.
- [[grammar:Zullen we een microfoon reserveren?]] — Shall we reserve a microphone?
- [[grammar:Ja, anders hoort niet iedereen de uitleg.]] — Yes, otherwise not everyone will hear the explanation.
- [[grammar:Misschien kan Pieter koffie leveren.]] — Perhaps Pieter can provide coffee.
- [[grammar:Ik nodig hem morgen uit voor het overleg.]] — I will invite him to the meeting tomorrow.
- [[grammar:Zullen we ook een poster maken?]] — Shall we make a poster too?
- [[grammar:Ja, die hangen we bij de bibliotheek.]] — Yes, we will hang it by the library.
- [[grammar:Misschien komen er meer mensen dan verwacht.]] — Perhaps more people will come than expected.
- [[grammar:Dan hebben we genoeg stoelen nodig.]] — Then we will need enough chairs.
- [[grammar:Zullen we morgen het hele plan bevestigen?]] — Shall we confirm the whole plan tomorrow?
- [[grammar:Afgesproken. Ik stuur vanavond de eerste berichten.]] — Agreed. I will send the first messages this evening.
